title: The Crew Regroups Under Disaster
description: Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.
scene: Across pages 17, this scene centers on Luffy, Nola, Wyper, Enel, Aisa. Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.
summary: Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.
